sagemaker.featuregroup.onlinestoresecuri.Description: The AWS Key Management Service (KMS) key ARN that SageMaker Feature Store uses to encrypt the Amazon S3 objects at rest using Amazon S3 server-side encryption.  The caller (either user or IAM role) of `CreateFeatureGroup` must have below permissions to the `OnlineStore` `KmsKeyId`:  +  `"kms:Encrypt"` +  `"kms:Decrypt"` +  `"kms:DescribeKey"` +  `"kms:CreateGrant"` +  `"kms:RetireGrant"` +  `"kms:ReEncryptFrom"` +  `"kms:ReEncryptTo"` +  `"kms:GenerateDataKey"` +  `"kms:ListAliases"` +  `"kms:ListGrants"` +  `"kms:RevokeGrant"` The caller (either user or IAM role) to all DataPlane operations (`PutRecord`, `GetRecord`, `DeleteRecord`) must have the following permissions to the `KmsKeyId`:  +  `"kms:Decrypt"`
